description: Append-only state transition log for every booking. One row per state change. Enables full audit trail of how each booking progressed. Also captures asset status changes and config control changes.

guards.completed: event_date must be in the past
guards.dnc: requires Harkirat approval or blocklist match

columns.name: log_id
columns.description: Unique log row ID. Format: BLL-{timestamp_ms}-{random_4}

columns.name: booking_id
columns.description: Booking ID if transition is booking-related. Null for customer-only or asset events.

columns.name: entity_id
columns.description: ID of the entity that transitioned (booking_id, customer_id, asset_id, or control_id)

columns.name: from_state
columns.description: Previous state. Null for initial creation event.

columns.name: triggered_by
columns.description: Who/what triggered it: 'system', 'harkirat', worker script name, or 'ai'

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Optional context about why this transition occurred

columns.name: trace_id
columns.description: Links to Ops_IdempotencyLog.trace_id for the same processing run

setup_notes: Tab starts empty. Rows appended by BookingLifecycle module. Never manually edit. Human overrides should still be logged with triggered_by = 'harkirat' and a note.
